user_features.gender: Feminine casual presentation with soft colors and relaxed street-style styling.
user_features.skin_tone: Fair to light skin tone with a neutral-to-warm overall color palette context.
user_features.hairstyle: Short, tousled bob-length hair with soft layers and bangs framing the face.
user_features.body_type_characteristics: Slim-to-average frame with a relaxed, loose outfit silhouette; the cropped shirt and wide-leg jeans create volume through the torso and legs rather than emphasizing body curves.

current_outfit.style: Relaxed casual streetwear with soft pastel tones, an oversized cropped shirt, wide-leg lace-up denim, and minimal sneakers.
current_outfit.color: Pale pink short-sleeve shirt, light blue jeans, white shoes, and a dark brown shoulder bag.
current_outfit.material: Lightweight woven/cotton-like shirt, washed denim jeans, leather or faux-leather bag, and casual sneaker material.

advantages: The soft pastel pink shirt pairs well with the light-wash denim, creating a gentle, cohesive spring/summer palette.
The cropped, relaxed shirt and wide-leg jeans create an easy casual silhouette with a stylish streetwear feel.
areas_for_improvement: The oversized proportions on both top and bottom slightly reduce waist definition; adding a belt or choosing a more structured top could balance the silhouette.
The jeans have strong volume and tie details, so simpler footwear or a cleaner hem treatment would make the outfit look more polished.
